title: Project Engineer - BMS / ELV
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Manage daily operation and execution of project
  • Develop cost estimates, project budget and manage project costing
  • Manpower planning and efficient deployment of manpower based on call traffic patterns / workload requirements
  • Plan, control and execute work progress
  • Prepare progress reports and claims submission
  • Overall in charge for project’s day to day operation
  • To manage technician's daily job scopes deployment and ensure that all tasks are up to date and meet the project timeline
  • Collaborate with main-con closely on all issues and reviews related to the projects
  • To provide engineering support to project team and customers, including field work as and when required;
  • Manage and control project scope and variation order
  • Coordinate with client on project activities, including attending meetings and discussions
  • Identify area for project improvements and makes recommendation to the management team
  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Manager or Management

Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess at least Diploma in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or equivalent
  • At least 3 Year(s) of working experience in the related field
  • Required Skill(s): Project Management , BMS , ELV , Security System
  • Excellent knowledge on BMS and AutoCad is preferred
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Team player, pro-active work attitude & be able to work independently with minimum guidance
  • Comfortable with 5.5 work days

postedCompany.description:
RH SYNERGY (S) PTE. LTD.

Founded in 2006, RH Synergy is trading and solution integrator provider, providing expertises in fields of surveillance system, access control system, facility monitoring system, public address system, car park management system, automatic barrier system and customized IT application. Our main team of multi-disciplinary consultants consists of an elite group of experience in risk assessment and design of facilities security solution.

As your business demands changes, the system should adapt to meet those demands, instead of impeding your business. with our expertise, we can help you plan and implement a system that is flexible and adaptable to your growing business, while protecting your investment. with our motto "Invest with Peace of Mind", we wish to extend our knowledge and expertise in security solutions to our customers and potentials that there should never be a compromise to protect your assets and loved ones. By focusing on innovative application of technology, best practices and a dedicated team of experienced consultants and highly trained technical personnels, we adopted a partnership approach in designing the best of breed security solution to our customers.
postedCompany.name: RH SYNERGY (S) PTE. LTD.
